description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly yellow with a black front panel and control area. The front features a large display screen set within a black bezel, flanked by a marquee at the top with the iconic 'PAC-MAN' logo in bold yellow and red letters. The control panel is equipped with two joysticks and multiple colored buttons, suggesting support for two players. The lower front panel also displays the 'PAC-MAN' logo, while the left side is adorned with vibrant artwork depicting Pac-Man and ghost characters in a playful scene. The right side is plain yellow, and the back is a solid dark color, likely for maintenance access. The cabinet is constructed from wood or particleboard, with metal and plastic components for the controls and screen.
description: A classic yellow PAC-MAN arcade cabinet with a black front, colorful side artwork, and a control panel featuring two joysticks and multiple buttons. The top marquee displays the PAC-MAN logo, and the cabinet is built from wood with metal and plastic details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the PAC-MAN marquee, large display screen, dual joystick control panel, and lower PAC-MAN logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bright yellow panel with detailed PAC-MAN and ghost artwork.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark panel with no visible artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain yellow panel without any artwork or graphics.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a thick black bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple colored buttons arranged side-by-side for two players, with a black control surface and red/yellow button accents.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the PAC-MAN logo in bold yellow letters with a red outline on a black background, matching the game's classic theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Left side features colorful PAC-MAN and ghost artwork with a playful, cartoonish style; right side is plain yellow with no graphics.
